name: Softy
description: FOOT LOTION: Kick back and relax as a dreamy blend of rich butters and marshmallow root soften your soles.
archive_note: Softy has appeared as a Kitchen exclusive foot lotion, celebrated for its marshmallow root and rich butter blend aimed at intense foot softening
nostalgia_angle: Softy foot lotion is a Kitchen gem that fans of Lush's indulgent body care line adore for its gentle, comforting formula perfect for tired feet
throwback_reference: Evokes the same cosy, marshmallow-soft comfort as products like Sleepy, making it a natural bedtime foot-care companion
